{{Quote|The Right Earl of Qalita Prime is appealing for help in dealing with pirate raiders. Six ships have been attacked within a month, four of them successfully. The cargo syndicates are threatening to stop supplying the planet.|[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]|<ref name="BtS" />}}
'''Qalita Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] that was represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Right Earl]] was the leader of this planet.<ref name="BtS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
